user_prompt: Draft a follow-up message for a ticket that was marked resolved 5 days ago, just confirming everything is still working.
actual_output:
Here is a draft you can use to follow up with the customer:

**Subject:** Checking in on your recent support ticket

Hi [Customer Name],

I'm following up on your recent support ticket regarding [briefly mention the issue, e.g., your login trouble]. It's been a few days since we marked this as resolved, and I just wanted to check in to make sure everything is still working smoothly for you. 

If you are still running into any trouble or have any new questions, please just reply to this email and let me know—I'm happy to help. 

If everything is good to go, there's no need to reply. Have a great rest of your week!

Best,

Compass
OpenClaw Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified the request as a standard support task and provided a professional draft that aligns with its persona and behavioral guidelines.
